fields.target: People with a BMI over 30 (or  27.5 for people from black, Asian, and ethnic minority backgrounds)
People who have have diabetes, high blood pressure, or both
Men age 18 or over with a BMI of 27.50 or over
Anyone living or working in Tower Hamlets
Anyone who lives, works or studies in Tower Hamlets
Anyone with a BMI lower than 18.5

fields.required: 4 to 5 times a week (or whatever fits in with your lifestyle)

fields.type: Using the app with access to an online community
Local in-person group workshops with a coach
Online Zoom group workshops with coaching
Using the app to access a weight loss plan
Using the app to scan food
Website with access to an online community
Online workouts with access to a Facebook group for registered members
You can choose your sessions to be provided face to face or online (or both).

fields.name: "Core" plan with group workshops from £9.55 a month
Yearly plan: 7-day free trial then £80.99 a year (or £6.75 a month)
Free access to 10 beginner level programmes
Gym access with referral £15 a month

fields.name: Parkrun
fields.description: A free, weekly, timed 5k run (or walk) that happens in parks and open spaces around the country.
fields.what_it_is: Parkruns are free, local 5k runs that anyone can enter.
fields.how_it_works: Parkruns usually happen at the same time and place, once a week. If you want your time to be recorded you'll need to register on the Parkrun website to get a personal ID. A volunteer will record your finishing time at the end.
fields.what_it_could_do: Doing parkruns regularly could help you improve your physical and mental health, and help you connect with your local community too.

fields.name: NHS Couch to 5k
fields.description: The NHS Couch to 5k app guides you from the couch to running 5km in just 9 weeks.
fields.what_it_is: Couch to 5k is a simple, free running plan for absolute beginners.
fields.how_it_works:
A trainer will guide you as you start with a mix of running and walking.

In the first week, you'll start with 1 minute runs, followed by a 1 minute 30 second walk, going at a pace that feels right for you. Each week, you'll run a little more.
fields.what_it_could_do: By the end, you'll be running 5k with confidence, no matter your starting fitness level or when you last exercised.

fields.name: Weight Watchers
fields.description: A personalised plan with live and on-demand coaching to help you lose weight and stay healthy.
fields.what_it_is: The Weight Watchers app provides a personalised nutrition plan, activity trackers and over 4,500 recipe ideas.
fields.how_it_works: Choose between a core membership or a membership with workshops. Both memberships include a 30-day free trial and a customised nutrition plan, activity trackers and recipes.
fields.what_it_could_do: If you're overweight, making small changes to what you are eating can drinking can help you lose weight. And it could help reduce the risk of developing health conditions like high blood pressure, heart disease and type 2 diabetes.
fields.cost_text: Free trial then from £6.50 a month

fields.name: NHS Active 10
fields.description: The free NHS Active 10 app anonymously records every minute of walking you do.
fields.what_it_is: Active 10 is a free app that helps you fit short, brisk walks in to your day. Active 10 means 10 brisk minutes.
fields.how_it_works:
Track all your walking and how many brisk minutes you've walked in the Active 10 app. The app's Pace Checker will help you learn what brisk walking feels like.

You can set goals to keep you motivated and you'll earn rewards for every brisk minute you walk throughout the day.
fields.what_it_could_do:
Just 10 minutes of brisk walking every day can get your heart pumping and can make you feel more energetic, as well as lowering your risk of serious illnesses like heart disease and type 2 diabetes.

Going for a brisk walk is a great way to clear your head and improve your mood. And it's easy to fit into your day, from taking the dog out to going for a lunchtime walk.

fields.name: NHS Digital Weight Management Programme
fields.description: A 12-week online behavioural and lifestyle programme.
fields.what_it_is: The NHS Digital Weight Management Programme supports adults living with obesity who also have a diagnosis of diabetes or hypertension to manage their weight and improve their health.
fields.how_it_works:
You need to speak to your GP or a local pharmacist who can refer you to the programme.

You choose a weight management plan to help you develop healthier eating habits, be more active and lose weight. Each plan provides recipes and nutrition advice, wellbeing support and tips to boost your activity levels. As an online plan, you can do it anywhere in your own time.
fields.what_it_could_do: This programme supports you to start building healthy habits so you can eat, sleep and feel better.

fields.name: NHS Weight Loss Plan
fields.description: An app to help you start eating more healthily, being more active, and losing weight.
fields.what_it_is:
The NHS Weight Loss Plan gives you a 12-week plan that helps you:

  • set weight loss goals
  • plan your meals
  • make healthier food choices
  • get more active and burn more calories
  • record your activity and progress
fields.how_it_works:
Follow weekly NHS guides to help you maintain a balanced diet, and use the daily diary to monitor what you’re eating and keep to a recommended calorie target.

The app will help you work out what a healthy weight is for you by using an in-app BMI calculator and help you set a healthy calorie target that’s right for you.

Each weekly guide has actions, hints and tips for reaching your goal. To keep track of your progress you can log the food and calories you eat at each meal in the dairy, and you can record your weight each week to monitor your weight-loss.
fields.what_it_could_do: If you're overweight, making small changes to what you are eating can drinking can help you lose weight. And it could help reduce the risk of developing health conditions like high blood pressure, heart disease and type 2 diabetes.

fields.name: NHS Food Scanner
fields.description: A food scanning app to help you find healthier swaps for the next time you shop.
fields.what_it_is: The NHS Food Scanner lets you scan the barcode on a product's packaging using your phone's camera. The app will then tell you if there are any healthier options available.
fields.how_it_works:
The app will show you things like:

  • whether a product is a 'good choice'
  • traffic light ratings so know if a product is high, medium or low in sugar, salt and fat
  • the full list of every product you've ever scanned
fields.what_it_could_do: Making better food and drink choices could help you and your family stay healthy.

fields.name: Fit Fans
fields.description: A health programme that provides free, weekly sessions at your local football club.
fields.what_it_is: Football clubs across the country offer a free health programme for people who want to lose weight, get fitter and lead a healthier, more active life.
fields.how_it_works:
• Go to weekly sessions at your local football club.
  • Meet other football fans on the same journey as you.
  • Learn how to make better choices to improve your lifestyle and health.
  • Be supported through your journey by club staff.
fields.what_it_could_do: Making long-term improvements in weight loss, physical activity, diet and general wellbeing can help you stay healthy for longer.

fields.name: The Body Coach
fields.description: An app to help you improve your fitness with quick workouts for all abilities and simple, tasty recipes.
fields.what_it_is:
The Body Coach app provides:

  • a structured workout programme for your ability
  • recipes tailored to your body and goals
  • live workouts with Joe and Body Coach trainers
  • access to the Body Coach community
fields.how_it_works:
When you sign up, you'll answer a few quick questions so you can get a plan that's tailored to you.

Based on your current fitness level, you'll get a structured workout plan and a set of recipes with portions tailored specifically to you and your goals.

Every month, you'll get access to new workouts to help build on your fitness and strength, along with a set of new recipes so you keep making progress.
fields.what_it_could_do: The programme is designed to help you improve your fitness, but it can also have a big impact on your energy, happiness and overall health.
fields.cost_text: Free trial then discounts. From £6.75 a month.
fields.action_url: Free trial then discounts. From £6.75 a month.

fields.name: Slimming World
fields.description: A weight-loss programme providing mindset-shifting, habit-changing support that will get you to your weight-loss target and help you stay there.
fields.what_it_is:
You can choose a group or online membership to help you reach your weight-loss target. Both memberships offer:

  • more than 2,000 exclusive Slimming World recipes
  • meal plans, weight-loss tools, strategies, and articles
  • on-demand exercise videos tailored to your activity level
  • a barcode scanner to help you make good food choices
fields.how_it_works:
The group membership is for people who would like the accountability, friendship and in-person support and community of other slimmers. Your local Slimming World consultant and friends in group will be there to cheer you on every step of the way on your weight loss journey.  

The digital service, Slimming World Online, is good if you need a little more flexibility. There's a community of online members for support and encouragement (when you want it), and unlimited access to digital live events for extra motivation.
fields.what_it_could_do: The programme can help you reach the weight you want to be – you choose your own target. By following a tailored plan, you can build healthy habits that last.

fields.name: MAN V FAT Football
fields.description: A weight-loss programme for football-loving men.
fields.what_it_is:
MAN V FAT Football helps men across the country lose weight and improve their health through:

  • playing football
  • getting team support
  • an app with useful articles and recipes
  • mental health support
  • over 200 online gym classes
fields.how_it_works:
After you sign up to your local club, you'll get access to the online app and online gym classes straightaway.

Next, you’ll get a text from your coach before you’re assigned to a team. Then you can start your first club session.
fields.what_it_could_do: Playing football and spending time with a supportive team can help you lose weight, make friends, get fitter and improve your health.
fields.cost_text: First month half price then £35 a month.
fields.action_text: Register now for first month half price

fields.name: Couch to Fitness
fields.description: Online workout plans to suit your fitness level.
fields.what_it_is: Couch to Fitness provides a free online workout plan that you can do at home, in your own time.
fields.how_it_works: Expert instructors guide you through 30-minute sessions 3 times a week. The sessions are suitable for different fitness levels and you don't need any equipment.
fields.what_it_could_do: Doing these workouts regulary can help you get fitter and healthier at a pace that suits you.

fields.name: Better Leisure centres
fields.description: Fitness centres around the country providing access to exercise classes and fitness facilities.
fields.what_it_is:
Better Leisure Centres offer a range of activities to help you move more, including:

  • swimming
  • the gym
  • exercise classes
fields.how_it_works:
Find your local Better Leisure centre and choose the activities or memberships that work for you.

Some centres provide creche facilities for under 5s so you can do an activity while your children are being looked after.
fields.what_it_could_do: However you choose to be active, doing exercise regularly can help you get fit and stay healthy.

fields.name: Instructor Live
fields.description: A fitness platform with classes designed for beginners.
fields.what_it_is:
The Instructor Live beginners package includes classes like:

  • high intensity interval training (HIIT) for beginners
  • introduction to pilates
  • dance HIIT for beginners
  • beginners aerobics
  • daily meditation practice
  • yoga basics
  • introduction to weights
fields.how_it_works: You can access these classes as often as you like for 3 months. It's a self-paced, online course, so you decide when you start and finish.
fields.what_it_could_do: If you're new to working out, or haven't done much exercise in a while, these beginner classes can help ease you in to getting fitter and more active.
fields.cost_text: Free beginner classes for 3 months then from £4.99 a month.

fields.name: Anytime Fitness
fields.description: Gyms around the country that are open 24/7.
fields.what_it_is: Anytime Fitness provides gym facilities, group training classes and supportive coaches.
fields.how_it_works:
Find a club near you and use a free 3-day pass so you can:

  • discuss your health goals with one of the Anytime Fitness team
  • be taken on a club tour to see the range of exercise options and support available to you
  • enjoy some free workouts and see if a fitness membership is for you
fields.what_it_could_do: You can get fitter and healthier in a way that fits in with your life.

fields.name: Everyone Active
fields.description: Fitness centres with different memberships to suit different needs.
fields.what_it_is: Everyone Active provides gyms, pools, exercise classes and wellness memberships.
fields.how_it_works:
You can choose from:

  • an exercise referral programme, which is for people living with long-term health conditions
  • guest day passes
  • an app, which gives you access to services like exercise classes and personal training
fields.what_it_could_do: Finding a way to get active could help you improve your overall physical and mental health and wellbeing.
fields.cost_text: Free 1-day pass. Memberships from £9.99 a month.

fields.name: Tower Hamlets Outdoor Gyms
fields.description: 16 outdoor gyms across the borough.
fields.what_it_is: Tower Hamlets outdoor gyms provide equipment like pull-up bars, chest-press machines and cross-trainers.
fields.how_it_works: Find an outdoor gym near you and get started. You can log, track and share your workout on the TGO Activate app or the KOMPAN Outdoor Fitness App depending which gym you are using.
fields.what_it_could_do: Build up strength or improve your fitness outside, whenever works for you.

fields.name: Queen Mary weight action plan
fields.description: A free, 12-week weight management course for Tower Hamlets residents.
fields.what_it_is: The course encourages you to try different tasks to find the weight management approach that works for you. It provides group support to help you keep going.
fields.how_it_works:
Over the first 8 weeks of the course, you will be given a series of tasks. You have to practice each task for at least the following week and record that you did it.
If the task worked, you can continue to use it. If it did not work or was too difficult, you can stop it and try a different task. This gives you a good idea of the approaches that you can adopt long-term – and you can practice them with guidance for the last 4 weeks of the 12-week course.
fields.what_it_could_do: Research shows that the programme helps over 40% of participants to lose at least 5% of their body weight at one year.

fields.name: Ability Bow
fields.description: Intensive 12-week exercise and dietary weight management service for Tower Hamlets residents living with a physical disability.
fields.what_it_is:
Eat Well & Move provides focused one-to-one and small group exercise and nutrition sessions. You will:

- increase your physical activity levels with support from our expert instructors
- work with a dietician to identify ways to eat healthily and to manage your weight
fields.how_it_works:
You need a medical referral to join this programme. 

A specialist, qualified and experienced team help you set achievable goals and manage your weight. They also advise you on ways to sustain a healthy weight beyond the programme.

Sessions can be in-person and online.
fields.what_it_could_do: If you're overweight, moving more and eating well can help you stay healthy for longer.

fields.name: Social Prescribing services
fields.description: A way to connect local Tower Hamlets residents to non-medical support.
fields.what_it_is: Social prescribers work with you to understand your needs and guide you to the right local support for you, for example wellbeing support or access to exercise facilities.
fields.how_it_works:
Social prescribing can help you:
- understand what local support is available
- access the local support you need

You can use social prescribing services if you have a referral from a GP or approved organisation, or by referring yourself.
fields.what_it_could_do: Studies show that social prescribing can help people feel better faster than with medicine alone. It can help you find the right local support to meet your specific needs.

fields.name: Stifford Centre Healthy Lifestyle Programme
fields.description: A programme to help Tower Hamlets residents make positive lifestyle changes.
fields.what_it_is:
A team of health advisors offer information, one-to-one, step-by-step motivational support, and activity groups like: 

- healthy eating workshops
- cook and eat sessions
- exercise classes
fields.how_it_works:
Get in touch with the Healthy Trainers team. The health advisors are members of the local community who are qualified to provide support and guidance on healthier living.

Anyone who lives, works or studies in Tower Hamlets can self-refer or get a referral from their GP.
fields.what_it_could_do: Making positive lifestyle changes with the help of local experts can help you get healthy in a way that fits in with your life.

fields.name: Idea Stores Fitness and Wellbeing
fields.description: Fitness and wellbeing classes for Tower Hamlets residents.
fields.what_it_is:
Idea Stores offer a range of classes including:

- strength training for longer life
- Pilates for walkers, runners and movers
- exercise for peri-menopause and menopause
- Tai Chi
fields.how_it_works:
Fitness classes are available at beginner, intermediate or 'all levels'.

Most wellbeing courses are beginner level. They are short courses and are a good introduction to the topic. Tutors will let you know about further courses, or other ways to progress at the end of the course.
fields.what_it_could_do:
Idea Stores classes could help you:

- develop strength and flexibility
- boost your mood, wellbeing and self-esteem
- stay active while meeting new people
